sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْوَلَدُ إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ مَعَ أَبِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak je stigao na plažu sa ocem.
sentences.translationEn: The boy arrived at the beach with his father.

sentences.translation: Skinuo je cipele i hodao po pijesku.
sentences.translationEn: He took off his shoes and walked on the sand.

sentences.translation: Pijesak je bio topao a voda hladna.
sentences.translationEn: The sand was warm and the water was cold.

sentences.translation: Igrao se pijeskom i bio veoma sretan.
sentences.translationEn: He played in the sand and was very happy.
